name: [GRV-API] Distributed Tracing Health Monitor
message:
Distributed tracing health issues detected for grv-api service.

Environment: {{env}}
Service: {{service}}
Tracing Issues:
- Missing trace IDs: {{trace.django.request.hits:!trace_id:*}} requests
- Missing parent IDs: {{trace.django.request.hits:!parent_id:*}} requests
- May indicate tracing configuration issues

Impact Analysis:
- Reduced observability and debugging capability
- Difficult to trace requests across services
- May impact distributed system monitoring
- Performance analysis may be incomplete

Investigation Steps:
1. Check ddtrace configuration and version
2. Verify tracing headers propagation
3. Review application startup logs
4. Check for sampling rate issues
5. Validate tracing agent connectivity

Tracing Dashboard: https://app.datadoghq.com/apm/services/grv-api?env=prod

options.escalation_message: Distributed tracing health issues persist. Observability capabilities may be severely reduced.
